title: sikarios #4607
definition:
1) an assassin
    1a) one who carries a dagger or short sword under his clothing, that
        he may kill secretly and treacherously any one he wishes to
    1b) a cutthroat

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5811\\
                        dan \\5889\\
